title: Evening session trend breakout
heuristic: Evening window (broker 18-23), a strong 4h trend (|mom_4h| >= ~$20) and price breaking to the trend-side extreme of the 60-min range (rng_pos >= 0.80 long / <= 0.20 short) — arm a basket in the 4h-trend direction.

title: Midnight Asian-open long thrust
heuristic: Midnight window (broker ~3) on a firm uptrend; live EA was ~100% long here. Long-only thrust off the Asian open with a slightly lower trend floor.

title: Morning two-sided breakout
heuristic: Morning window (broker 8-11): weaker trend floor (~$10) but a slightly stronger breakout fraction; more two-sided than evening/midnight.

title: Grid recovery to aggregate take-profit
heuristic: An adverse-add basket whose VWAP is dragged back to the ~$1/oz aggregate take-profit as price reverts. The bread-and-butter winner (98% of live baskets close green).

title: Counter-trend stuck basket (AVOID)
heuristic: The tail risk: a basket armed against the higher-timeframe trend that price never reverts to, grinding the grid to its max adverse / stop. Recognising and NOT arming this is the edge.
